---
title: "Cloud Studio"
---

# Testing the agent via LangSmith Cloud

::: {.callout-note}
**Audience:** legal and content contributors with a LangSmith Plus-tier seat. No
local setup or terminal required. Contributors without a Plus-tier seat should use
[Local Studio](../content-contributor/local-studio.qmd) instead.
:::

Studio lets you chat with the full agent — tools, RAG retrieval, and all — in an
interactive UI. In the browser, no local setup is needed:

1. Go to **LangSmith → Deployments → your deployment → Studio**.
2. Chat with the agent as a tenant would, and inspect its tool calls and retrieved
   passages.

The agent is deployed from the `langgraph.json` manifest in `backend/`, and
environment variables are configured in the deployment settings (a backend
contributor sets these up — see
[Setup & Environment Variables](../backend-contributor/setup-and-environment.qmd)).

Cloud deployment also unlocks:

- **Bound evaluators** — LLM-as-judge evaluators configured in the UI that auto-run
  on new experiments. See [Bound Evaluators](bound-evaluators.qmd).
- **Experiment comparison** — side-by-side scoring across prompt or code changes.
  See [Viewing & Comparing Results](../editing-and-results/viewing-results.qmd).

To change the chatbot's behavior while you chat, use the Configuration panel to
edit the system prompt live — see
[Editing the System Prompt](../editing-and-results/system-prompt.qmd).
